content.text:
<user_query>
Explore the TREK_alt directory at `/Users/aryanchaudhary/Downloads/fullstack-main/TREK_alt/`. This is a self-hosted travel planner app (open source) we are studying as a reference.

I need a very thorough breakdown of:

1. **Server architecture** (`TREK_alt/server/src/`)
   - List ALL routes in `server/src/routes/` and describe what each route does (admin, airports, assignments, atlas, auth, backup, budget, categories, collab, dayNotes, days, files, journey, journeyPublic, maps, memories, notifications, oauth, oidc, packing, photos, places, publicConfig, reservations, settings, share, systemNotices, tags, todo, trips, vacay, weather)
   - Database schema (already partially read at `server/src/db/schema.ts` — confirm full tables list)
   - WebSocket realtime (`server/src/websocket.ts`) — what events flow
   - MCP server (`server/src/mcp/`) — list of tools/scopes/resources exposed for AI assistants
   - Middleware list (auth, mfa, idempotency, validate, tripAccess)
   - Scheduler & background jobs (`server/src/scheduler.ts`)
   - Notable services

2. **Client architecture** (`TREK_alt/client/src/`)
   - All pages (DashboardPage, TripPlannerPage, AtlasPage, JourneyPage, etc.) — what each does
   - Component groupings (Admin, Budget, Collab, Dashboard, Files, Journey, Layout, Map, Memories, Notifications, OAuth, PDF, Packing, Photos, Planner, Settings, SystemNotices, Todo, Trips, Vacay, Weather)
   - State stores (Zustand) — `tripStore`, `authStore`, `journeyStore`, `vacayStore`, etc.
   - Sync layer (`client/src/sync/`) — offline / realtime
   - Repo layer (`client/src/repo/`)
   - i18n setup
   - Service worker / PWA

3. **Feature list** (use the wiki at `TREK_alt/wiki/` as ground truth — there are ~80 wiki pages including: Trip-Planner-Overview, Map-Features, Day-Plans-and-Notes, Reservations-and-Bookings, Budget-Tracking, Packing-Lists, Documents-and-Files, Real-Time-Collaboration, Collab-Chat/Notes/Polls, Journey-Journal, Atlas, Vacay, Weather-Forecasts, OIDC-SSO, Two-Factor-Authentication, MCP-Overview, etc.). Compile the full feature inventory grouped logically.

4. **Tech stack** — confirm: Node 22 + Express + better-sqlite3 + ws, React 18 + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind + Zustand + Leaflet + Mapbox GL, JWT + OIDC + TOTP MFA, Docker, PWA with Workbox.

5. **Key integrations** — Open-Meteo, Google Places, OpenStreetMap, Immich, Synology Photos, Naver Maps import.

Output a structured markdown summary covering all of the above in EXTREME detail (don't skip features). Use bullet lists and headers. Cite specific file paths in `TREK_alt/...` form. Aim for completeness, not brevity. Use thoroughness level: very thorough.
</user_query>

Exploring the TREK_alt codebase systematically: listing routes, schema, websocket, MCP, client structure, wiki, and dependencies.

[REDACTED]

Here is a structured reference based on the tree under `/Users/aryanchaudhary/Downloads/fullstack-main/TREK_alt/`.

---

# TREK_alt — Architecture and feature reference

## 1. Server architecture (`TREK_alt/server/src/`)

### 1.1 HTTP app shell (`TREK_alt/server/src/app.ts`, `TREK_alt/server/src/index.ts`)

- **Express** with **Helmet** CSP (allows OSM, Nominatim, Overpass, Google Places, Open-Meteo, Mapbox, OSRM, etc.), **CORS**, **cookie-parser**, optional **HTTPS redirect** and **trust proxy**.
- **Static uploads**: public avatar/cover/journey paths; **photos** gated (JWT or matching share token).
- **MCP**: `POST|GET|DELETE` on `/mcp`.
- **OAuth discovery**: `/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server`, `/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource` (gated on MCP addon).
- **Production**: serves built SPA from `TREK_alt/server/public` (`TREK_alt/Dockerfile` copies client `dist` there).

Startup (`TREK_alt/server/src/index.ts`): schedules backup (via `scheduler.start()`), trip reminders, **todo reminders**, version check, demo reset, idempotency cleanup, trek photo cache cleanup, ephemeral token cleanup, then attaches **WebSocket** on `/ws`.

---

### 1.2 Routes (`TREK_alt/server/src/routes/`) — mount prefixes from `app.ts`

All paths below are **relative to the mount**; many full paths are **`/api/...`** (see `app.ts`).

| File | Mount / pattern | Role |
|------|-----------------|------|
| **`admin.ts`** | `/api/admin` (`router.use(authenticate, adminOnly)`) | User CRUD, stats, permission matrix, audit log, OIDC admin config, demo baseline, GitHub releases / version check, notification prefs, invites, bag-tracking toggles, Google Places feature toggles (photos/autocomplete/details), collab sub-features, packing templates CRUD (nested categories/items), addon toggles, admin MCP token revoke, OAuth session list/revoke. |
| **`airports.ts`** | `/api/airports` | `GET /search` — airport search; `GET /:iata` — lookup by IATA. |
| **`assignments.ts`** | `/api` (paths embed `trips/:tripId/...`) | List/create/delete/reorder assignments; move between days; participants; assignment time updates. Uses `requireTripAccess`. |
| **`atlas.ts`** | `/api/addons/atlas` | Stats, regions (+ geo), country detail; mark/unmark country; mark/unmark region; bucket list CRUD. |
| **`auth.ts`** | `/api/auth` | App config (optional auth), demo login, invite lookup, register/login, forgot/reset password, `me`, logout, password change, account delete, per-user maps/API keys, user settings, avatar upload/delete, user search, key validation, app-level settings (admin), travel stats, **MFA** (verify-login, setup, enable, disable), **MCP static tokens** CRUD, **`ws-token`** / **`resource-token`** (ephemeral tokens for WS/assets). |
| **`backup.ts`** | `/api/backup` (`authenticate`, `adminOnly`) | List backups, create, download, restore from server file, upload-restore, auto-backup settings get/put, delete backup. Some download paths may be less restricted — see file for `authenticate` on specific routes. |
| **`budget.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/budget` | List items, per-person summary, create, reorder items/categories, update item, member splits, member paid flag, settlement, delete. |
| **`categories.ts`** | `/api/categories` | List (auth); create/update/delete (**admin only**). |
| **`collab.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/collab` | Notes CRUD + file attach/delete; polls CRUD, vote, close, delete; messages list/send/react/delete; link preview. |
| **`dayNotes.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/days/:dayId/notes` | Day notes CRUD with length validation. |
| **`days.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/days` | Days CRUD; **accommodations** sub-router mounted as `/api/trips/:tripId/accommodations` in `app.ts` (same module). |
| **`files.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/files` | Authenticated list/upload/update/star/trash/restore/permanent-delete; public `GET /:id/download` with token pattern; file linking (`link`, `links`, unlink). |
| **`journey.ts`** | `/api/journeys` (addon gate in `app.ts`) | Full journey CRUD; entries CRUD/reorder; photos on entries/gallery; contributors; preferences; share link get/create/delete; trip link add/remove; suggestions and available trips. |
| **`journeyPublic.ts`** | `/api/public/journey` | Public read by token; public photo/delivery routes for journey assets. |
| **`maps.ts`** | `/api/maps` | Search, autocomplete, place details, place photo (+ bytes), reverse geocode, resolve URL (server-side map link resolution). |
| **`memories/unified.ts`** | `/api/integrations/memories` | Unified trip “memories”: trip photos, sharing flags, album links. |
| **`memories/immich.ts`** | under memories router prefix | Immich settings, status, test, browse/search, proxied assets, album sync. |
| **`memories/synology.ts`** | same | Synology Photos settings, status, test, albums, search, assets, sync. |
| **`notifications.ts`** | `/api/notifications` | Channel prefs; test SMTP/webhook/ntfy; in-app feed, unread count, read-all, delete-all, per-notification read/unread/delete, respond (interactive notifications). |
| **`oauth.ts`** | `/` (public) + `/api/oauth` | **Public**: discovery docs, `POST /oauth/token`, `POST /oauth/revoke`, `POST /oauth/register` (DCR). **API**: authorize validate + consent POST; OAuth client CRUD (some require cookie auth); session list/revoke. |
| **`oidc.ts`** | `/api/auth/oidc` | OIDC login redirect, callback, token exchange for SPA session. |
| **`packing.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/packing` | Items CRUD/import/reorder; bags CRUD; template apply; save-as-template; category assignees. |
| **`photos.ts`** | `/api/photos` | Authenticated thumbnail/original/info for uploaded trip photos by id. |
| **`places.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/places` | Places CRUD; bulk delete; imports: **GPX**, **map file**, **Google list**, **Naver list**; place image proxy; requires `requireTripAccess` / validation middleware on mutating bodies. |
| **`publicConfig.ts`** | `/api/config` | Minimal public client config (unauthenticated). |
| **`reservations.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/reservations` | Reservations CRUD; position updates; ties to budget/accommodations in service layer with WS broadcasts. |
| **`settings.ts`** | `/api/settings` | User settings get/put/bulk. |
| **`share.ts`** | `/api` | Create/get/delete trip share link; **`GET /shared/:token`** public payload. |
| **`systemNotices.ts`** | `/api/system-notices` | Active notices; dismiss by id. |
| **`tags.ts`** | `/api/tags` | User tags CRUD. |
| **`todo.ts`** | `/api/trips/:tripId/todo` | Todos CRUD, reorder, category assignees. |
| **`trips.ts`** | `/api/trips` | List/create/get/update/delete; cover upload; copy; members add/remove; **bundle** (offline sync); **export ICS**. |
| **`vacay.ts`** | `/api/addons/vacay` | Vacation plan CRUD; holiday calendars; invites; colors; years; entries toggle; company holidays; stats; public holiday APIs by country/year. |
| **`weather.ts`** | `/api/weather` | Current/summary and detailed forecasts (Open-Meteo-backed service). |

---

### 1.3 Database schema

**Baseline** in `TREK_alt/server/src/db/schema.ts` defines (among others): `users`, `password_reset_tokens`, `settings`, `trips`, `days`, `categories`, `tags`, `places`, `place_tags`, `day_assignments`, `packing_items`, `photos`, `trip_files`, `reservations`, `trip_members`, `day_notes`, `app_settings`, `budget_items`, `addons`, `photo_providers`, `photo_provider_fields`, vacay tables, `day_accommodations`, collab tables, `assignment_participants`, `audit_log`, `notifications`, `notification_channel_preferences`, `migrations`.

**Additional / evolved tables** appear in `TREK_alt/server/src/db/migrations.ts` (run on existing DBs), including for example: `schema_version`, `invite_tokens`, packing templates/bags/members/assignees, `visited_countries`, `bucket_list`, `place_regions`, `visited_regions`, `trip_photos`/`trek_photos`, `file_links`, `notification_preferences`, `share_tokens`, `mcp_tokens`, `trip_album_links`, `todo_items`, `todo_category_assignees`, OAuth (`oauth_clients`, `oauth_consents`, `oauth_tokens`), **journey** family (`journeys`, `journey_entries`, `journey_photos`, `journey_contributors`, `journey_share_tokens`, `journey_trips`, link/junction tables as migrated), `idempotency_keys`, `user_notice_dismissals`, `google_place_photo_meta`, `place_details_cache`, `trek_photo_cache_meta`, `reservation_endpoints`, `budget_item_members`, `budget_category_order`, `reservation_day_positions`, `collab_message_reactions`, and various **rebuild** staging tables during migrations.

**Authoritative list for a given instance** = tables present after migrations complete (see `migrations.ts` for the full evolution).

---

### 1.4 WebSocket (`TREK_alt/server/src/websocket.ts`)

- **Path**: `/ws`; **auth**: query param `token` validated via **`consumeEphemeralToken`** (`trek` … `TREK_alt/server/src/services/ephemeralTokens.ts`); loads user; enforces **global MFA** when `app_settings.require_mfa` is true.
- **Client protocol**: JSON messages with `type`:
  - **`join` / `leave`** with `tripId` — room membership after `canAccessTrip`.
  - Server replies **`welcome`** (socket id), **`joined`**, **`left`**, **`error`** (e.g. rate limit, access denied).
- **Keep-alive**: ping/pong every 30s; **rate limit** ~30 msgs / 10s per socket.
- **Broadcast helpers**: `broadcast(tripId, event, payload, excludeSocketId?)`, `broadcastToUser`, `getOnlineUserIds`.

**Domain events** observed on trip rooms (from `broadcast` / `safeBroadcast` usage; `_source: 'mcp'` may be added for MCP-originated updates in `TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/tools/_shared.ts`):

- **Trip**: `trip:updated`, `trip:deleted`; **MCP-only member events**: `member:added`, `member:removed`.
- **Places / assignments**: `place:created|updated|deleted`, `assignment:created|deleted|reordered|moved|updated`, `assignment:participants`.
- **Days / notes / accommodations**: `day:created|updated|deleted`, `dayNote:created|updated|deleted`, `accommodation:created|updated|deleted`.
- **Reservations**: `reservation:created|updated|deleted|positions`.
- **Budget**: `budget:created|updated|deleted|reordered`, `budget:members-updated`, `budget:member-paid-updated`.
- **Packing**: `packing:created|updated|deleted`, `packing:bag-*`, `packing:template-applied`, `packing:bag-members-up.updated`, `packing:assignees`.
- **Files**: `file:created|updated|deleted`.
- **Todo**: `todo:created|updated|deleted`, `todo:assignees`.
- **Collab**: `collab:note:*`, `collab:poll:*`, `collab:message:created|reacted|deleted`.
- **Memories**: `memories:updated` (unified + Immich sync paths).

---

### 1.5 MCP server (`TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/`)

- **Transport**: Streamable HTTP; **session** via `mcp-session-id`; **`TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/index.ts`** handles Bearer auth (`trekoa_*` OAuth access token, deprecated `trek_*` static MCP token, or short-lived JWT), rate limits, session caps, audit on `tools/call`, **`BASE_MCP_INSTRUCTIONS`** embedded in server instructions.
- **Resources** (`TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/resources.ts`): JSON `trek://…` URIs for trips, days, places, budget, packing, reservations, day notes, accommodations, members, collab (notes/polls/messages when enabled), todos, categories, atlas (bucket list, visited countries, stats, regions), notifications, vacay (plan, entries, holidays), journey (list/detail/entries/contributors) — all **scope-** and **addon-gated** as coded.
- **OAuth scopes** (`TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/scopes.ts`): `trips:*`, `places:*`, `atlas:*`, `packing:*`, `todos:*`, `budget:*`, `reservations:*`, `collab:*`, `notifications:*`, `vacay:*`, `geo:read`, `weather:read`, `journey:*` (+ `SCOPE_INFO` labels).

**Tools** (names from `registerTool` first argument across `TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/tools/*.ts`):

- **Trips**: `create_trip`, `update_trip`, `delete_trip`, `list_trips`, `get_trip_summary`, `list_trip_members`, `add_trip_member`, `remove_trip_member`, `copy_trip`, `export_trip_ics`, `get_share_link`, `create_share_link`, `delete_share_link`.
- **Places / geo**: `create_place`, `create_and_assign_place`, `update_place`, `delete_place`, `list_places`, `list_categories`, `search_place`, `import_places_from_url`, `bulk_delete_places`.
- **Days / accommodations / notes**: `update_day`, `create_day`, `delete_day`, `create_accommodation`, `create_place_accommodation`, `update_accommodation`, `delete_accommodation`, `create_day_note`, `update_day_note`, `delete_day_note`.
- **Assignments**: `assign_place_to_day`, `unassign_place`, `update_assignment_time`, `move_assignment`, `get_assignment_participants`, `set_assignment_participants`, `reorder_day_assignments`.
- **Tags**: `list_tags`, `create_tag`, `update_tag`, `delete_tag`.
- **Maps / weather / airports** (`mapsWeather.ts`): `get_place_details`, `reverse_geocode`, `resolve_maps_url`, `get_weather`, `get_detailed_weather`, `search_airports`, `get_airport`.
- **Budget**: `create_budget_item`, `delete_budget_item`, `update_budget_item`, `create_budget_item_with_members`, `set_budget_item_members`, `toggle_budget_member_paid`.
- **Packing**: `create_packing_item`, `toggle_packing_item`, `delete_packing_item`, `update_packing_item`, `reorder_packing_items`, `list_packing_bags`, `create_packing_bag`, `update_packing_bag`, `delete_packing_bag`, `set_bag_members`, `get_packing_category_assignees`, `set_packing_category_assignees`, `apply_packing_template`, `save_packing_template`, `bulk_import_packing`.
- **Reservations / transport**: `create_reservation`, `update_reservation`, `delete_reservation`, `reorder_reservations`, `link_hotel_accommodation`; **transports**: `create_transport`, `update_transport`, `delete_transport`.
- **Todos**: `list_todos`, `create_todo`, `update_todo`, `toggle_todo`, `delete_todo`, `reorder_todos`, `get_todo_category_assignees`, `set_todo_category_assignees`.
- **Notifications**: `list_notifications`, `get_unread_notification_count`, `mark_notification_read`, `mark_notification_unread`, `mark_all_notifications_read`.
- **Atlas**: `create_bucket_list_item`, `delete_bucket_list_item`, `mark_country_visited`, `unmark_country_visited`, `get_atlas_stats`, `list_visited_regions`, `mark_region_visited`, `unmark_region_visited`, `get_country_atlas_places`, `update_bucket_list_item`.
- **Collab** (gated by admin collab feature flags): notes `create/update/delete_collab_note`; polls `list/create/vote/close/delete_collab_poll`; chat `list/send/delete_collab_message`, `react_collab_message`.
- **Journey**: `list_journeys`, `get_journey`, `list_journey_entries`, `list_journey_contributors`, `get_journey_suggestions`, `list_journey_available_trips`, `create/update/delete_journey`, `add/remove_journey_trip`, `create/update/delete_journey_entry`, `reorder_journey_entries`, `add/update/remove_journey_contributor`, `update_journey_preferences`, `get/create/delete_journey_share_link`.
- **Vacay**: `get_vacay_plan`, `update_vacay_plan`, `set_vacay_color`, `get_available_vacay_users`, invite flow (`send/accept/decline/cancel`), `dissolve_vacay_plan`, years/entries/stats/holiday calendars, `list_holiday_countries`, `list_holidays`, etc. (full set in `vacay.ts` grep output above).

**Prompts** (`TREK_alt/server/src/mcp/tools/prompts.ts`): `token_auth_notice` (static token sessions), `trip-summary`, `packing-list` (addon), `budget-overview` (addon).

---

### 1.6 Middleware (`TREK_alt/server/src/middleware/`)

| File | Purpose |
|------|--------|
| **`auth.ts`** | `extractToken` (cookie `trek_session` then `Authorization`), `verifyJwtAndLoadUser` (+ `password_version`), `authenticate` (+ **`applyIdempotency`**), `requireCookieAuth`, `optionalAuth`, **`adminOnly`**, **`demoUploadBlock`**. |
| **`mfaPolicy.ts`** | **`enforceGlobalMfaPolicy`** — global MFA requirement from `app_settings`, with public and MFA-setup exempt paths. |
| **`idempotency.ts`** | **`applyIdempotency`** — caches mutating responses keyed by `X-Idempotency-Key` + user + method + path; 24h cleanup in scheduler. |
| **`tripAccess.ts`** | **`requireTripAccess`**, **`requireTripOwner`**. |
| **`validate.ts`** | **`validateStringLengths`**, **`maxLength`**. |

---

### 1.7 Scheduler and background jobs (`TREK_alt/server/src/scheduler.ts`)

- **`start()`**: **scheduled ZIP backup** (DB + uploads) per `backup-settings.json`; retention cleanup.
- **`startTripReminders`**: daily 09:00 (TZ from `TZ`) — trips with `reminder_days` matching tomorrow’s date → `notificationService.send('trip_reminder', …)`.
- **`startTodoReminders`**: daily 09:00 — unchecked todos with due dates within lead window → notify + `reminded_at` update.
- **`startDemoReset`**: hourly when `DEMO_MODE=true`.
- **`startVersionCheck`**: daily — `adminService.checkAndNotifyVersion`.
- **`startIdempotencyCleanup`**: nightly 03:00 — delete old **`idempotency_keys`** rows.
- **`startTrekPhotoCacheCleanup`**: every 2h + startup sweep — **`trekPhotoCache.sweepExpired`**.

Note: `stop()` clears backup/demo/reminder/version/idempotency/trek-cache tasks; **`todoReminderTask` is started by `index.ts` but not stopped in `stop()`** — worth being aware of for graceful shutdown completeness.

---

### 1.8 Notable services (`TREK_alt/server/src/services/`)

Representative modules: **`adminService`** (addons, version check, collab feature flags), **`authService`**, **`oauthService`**, **`oidcService`**, **`tripService`** (bundle, ICS, summary), **`placeService`**, **`assignmentService`**, **`dayService`**, **`dayNoteService`**, **`budgetService`** (settlement), **`packingService`**, **`reservationService`**, **`todoService`**, **`collabService`**, **`notificationService`** + **`inAppNotifications`**, **`mapsService`** (Google + OSM/Nominatim/Overpass, SSRF guard), **`weatherService`** (Open-Meteo), **`atlasService`**, **`vacayService`**, **`journeyService`**, **`journeyShareServic`**, **`shareService`**, **`fileService`**, **`backupService`**, **`auditLog`**, **`ephemeralTokens`**, **`airportService`**, memories (`**immichService**`, **`synologyService**`, **`unifiedService**`, **`trekPhotoCache**`, thumbnails), **`placePhotoCache`**, **`userCleanupService`**, **`demo`**, etc.

---

## 2. Client architecture (`TREK_alt/client/src/`)

### 2.1 Pages and routing (`TREK_alt/client/src/App.tsx`)

| Route | Page | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| `/`, `/login`, `/register` | `LoginPage` | Auth; register path reuses login component. |
| `/forgot-password`, `/reset-password` | Forgot/reset password | Account recovery. |
| `/shared/:token` | `SharedTripPage` | Public shared trip view. |
| `/public/journey/:token` | `JourneyPublicPage` | Public journey. |
| `/oauth/authorize` | `OAuthAuthorizePage` | OAuth consent UI. |
| `/dashboard` | `DashboardPage` | Trip list / widgets. |
| `/trips/:id` | `TripPlannerPage` | Main planner. |
| `/trips/:id/files` | `FilesPage` | Per-trip documents. |
| `/admin` | `AdminPage` | Admin (**admin** role). |
| `/settings` | `SettingsPage` | Account, display, maps, notifications, integrations, MFA, etc. |
| `/vacay` | `VacayPage` | Vacation planner addon. |
| `/atlas` | `AtlasPage` | Atlas addon. |
| `/journey`, `/journey/:id` | `JourneyPage`, `JourneyDetailPage` | Journey addon (**addonId="journey"`**). |
| `/notifications` | `InAppNotificationsPage` | In-app notification center. |
| `*` | Redirect `/` | Catch-all. |

**`PhotosPage`** exists at `TREK_alt/client/src/pages/PhotosPage.tsx` and is covered in tests with `/trips/:id/photos`, but **that route is not registered in `App.tsx`** — treat as a test-only or legacy surface unless wired elsewhere.

Global UI: `TranslationProvider`, `ToastContainer`, `BottomNav` inside `ProtectedRoute`, `OfflineBanner`, **`SystemNoticeHost`**.

---

### 2.2 Component groupings (`TREK_alt/client/src/components/`)

Directories align with your list: **Admin**, **Budget**, **Collab** (WhatsNext, polls, notes, chat, panel), **Dashboard**, **Files**, **Journey** (maps, journal body, markdown toolbar, mood/day colors, photo lightbox), **Layout** (navbar, bottom nav, offline banner, notification bell), **Map** (Leaflet/Mapbox GL adapters, route calculator, Mapbox overlays), **Memories**, **Notifications**, **OAuth** (`ScopeGroupPicker`), **PDF** (`TripPDF`, `JourneyBookPDF`), **Packing**, **Photos**, **Planner** (days, places, reservations, transport, imports), **Settings** (tabs: account, display, map, notifications, integrations, offline, photo providers, about), **SystemNotices**, **Todo**, **Trips** (modals, forms), **Vacay**, **Weather** (`WeatherWidget`), plus **shared** primitives (modal, toast, pickers, etc.).

---

### 2.3 Zustand stores (`TREK_alt/client/src/store/`)

- **`authStore`**: session, user, MFA flags, app config from server, maps key hints, demo/dev flags.
- **`tripStore`**: active trip / planner state.
- **`journeyStore`**: journeys and entries (see `journeyStore.ts`).
- **`vacayStore`**: vacay UI state.
- **`settingsStore`**: display + language (ties to i18n).
- **`addonStore`**: enabled addons/providers from `/api/addons`.
- **`permissionsStore`**: fine-grained UI permissions from app config.
- **`inAppNotificationStore`**: unread counts / feed hooks.
- **`systemNoticeStore`**: system notices.

---

### 2.4 Sync layer (`TREK_alt/client/src/sync/`)

- **`tripSyncManager.ts`**: after login / dashboard refresh / optional WS phase — fetches **`trips/:id/bundle`**, writes to **Dexie** (`TREK_alt/client/src/db/offlineDb.ts`), evicts old trips, optional **map tile prefetch**.
- **`mutationQueue.ts`**: offline writes queued with **`X-Idempotency-Key`** replay to REST when online.
- **`syncTriggers.ts`**: `online` → flush + full sync; **visibility** + **30s timer** + **WS pre-reconnect** → flush queue only.
- **`tilePrefetcher.ts`**: map tile prefetch for trips.

---

### 2.5 Repo layer (`TREK_alt/client/src/repo/`)

Thin **offline-first** facades: **`tripRepo`**, **`placeRepo`**, **`dayRepo`**, **`accommodationRepo`**, **`packingRepo`**, **`todoRepo`**, **`budgetRepo`**, **`reservationRepo`**, **`fileRepo`** — each chooses Dexie vs live API and enqueues mutations when offline (pattern in `placeRepo.ts`).

---

### 2.6 i18n (`TREK_alt/client/src/i18n/`)

- **`TranslationContext.tsx`**: `TranslationProvider`, **`useTranslation`** (`t`, `language`, `locale`), merges **15 locale files** (`en`, `de`, `es`, `fr`, `hu`, `it`, `ru`, `zh`, `zh-TW`, `nl`, `id`, `ar`, `br`, `cs`, `pl` per imports).
- **`supportedLanguages.ts`**: catalog for UI language picker.
- Helpers: **`getLocaleForLanguage`**, **`getIntlLanguage`**, **`isRtlLanguage`** (RTL e.g. `ar`), **`detectBrowserLanguage`**.
- Language preference is integrated with **`settingsStore`** (`SUPPORTED_LANGUAGE_CODES`).

---

### 2.7 PWA / service worker (`TREK_alt/client/vite.config.js`)

- **`vite-plugin-pwa`** with **`registerType: 'autoUpdate'`**, **Workbox**:
  - **`navigateFallback`**: SPA `index.html`; denylist `/api`, `/uploads`, `/mcp`.
  - **Runtime caches**: Carto + OSM tiles (CacheFirst), unpkg (Leaflet assets), API **NetworkFirst** (excluding auth/admin/backup/settings), covers/avatars CacheFirst.
- **Web app manifest**: name “TREK — Travel Planner”, standalone, icons.
- **`App.tsx`**: on version change from server, can **purge caches** and **unregister service workers** then reload.

---

## 3. Feature inventory (grounded in `TREK_alt/wiki/` + code)

Aligned with **`TREK_alt/wiki/_Sidebar.md`** (76 content pages beside sidebar/footer), grouped:

- **Getting started / ops**: Home, quick start, Docker/Compose/Helm/Proxmox/Unraid installs, reverse proxy, env vars, updating, troubleshooting, FAQ, contributing, dev environment, internal network, security hardening, encryption key rotation.
- **Account and auth**: Login/registration, OIDC SSO, MFA, password reset, user settings, display settings, map settings, notifications, offline/PWA, languages.
- **Trip planning**: Dashboard, creating trips, members/sharing, planner overview, places/search, day plans/notes, map features, route optimization, weather.
- **Travel logistics**: Reservations/bookings, transport (flights/trains/cars), accommodations, budget, packing + templates, todos, documents/files, tags/categories.
- **Photos and exports**: Photo providers (Immich/Synology/unified), PDF export.
- **Collaboration**: Real-time WS collaboration, collab chat/notes/polls, “What’s next” widget, public share links, invite links.
- **Addons**: Overview, Vacay, Atlas, Journey journal, dashboard widgets.
- **AI / MCP**: MCP overview/setup/scopes/tools/addon tools/prompts.
- **Admin**: Panel overview, users/invites, addons, categories, packing templates, permissions, MCP tokens, GitHub releases.
- **Operations**: Backups, demo mode, audit log.

---

## 4. Tech stack (confirmed from repo)

| Layer | Stack |
|-------|--------|
| **Runtime / server** | **Node 22** (`TREK_alt/Dockerfile`); local dev uses **`tsx`** (`TREK_alt/server/package.json`). |
| **Server framework** | **Express 4**, **better-sqlite3**, **ws**, **node-cron**, **helmet**, **cors**, **cookie-parser**, **multer**, **jsonwebtoken**, **zod**, **@modelcontextprotocol/sdk**. |
| **Client** | **React 18**, **Vite 5**, **TypeScript**, **Tailwind 3**, **Zustand 4**, **react-router-dom 6**, **axios**, **Dexie** (IndexedDB). |
| **Maps** | **Leaflet** + **react-leaflet**; **mapbox-gl**; routing utilities hitting **OSRM** (CSP in `app.ts`). |
| **Auth** | **JWT** (httpOnly cookie + Bearer); **OIDC** routes; **TOTP MFA** (`otplib` in server deps); **OAuth 2.1** for MCP. |
| **PWA** | **vite-plugin-pwa** / **Workbox** (`TREK_alt/client/vite.config.js`). |
| **Deploy** | **Docker** multi-stage build serving API + static SPA (`TREK_alt/Dockerfile`). |

---

## 5. Key external integrations

| Integration | Where it shows up |
|-------------|-------------------|
| **Open-Meteo** | `TREK_alt/server/src/services/weatherService.ts`, CSP `connectSrc` in `app.ts`; client/vite caching. |
| **Google Places** | `TREK_alt/server/src/services/mapsService.ts`; admin toggles for photos/autocomplete/details (`admin.ts`); Maps API routes. |
| **OpenStreetMap / Nominatim / Overpass** | `mapsService.ts`, CSP, client tile caching (Carto/OSM). |
| **Immich** | `TREK_alt/server/src/routes/memories/immich.ts`, `services/memories/immichService.ts`. |
| **Synology Photos** | `TREK_alt/server/src/routes/memories/synology.ts`, `services/memories/synologyService.ts`. |
| **Naver Maps import** | `POST .../places/import/naver-list` in `TREK_alt/server/src/routes/places.ts`. |

Additional map/geocoding-related endpoints in CSP: Wikimedia, natural-earth GeoJSON, **exchangerate-api** (if used for currency), etc. — see **`TREK_alt/server/src/app.ts`** `connectSrc` for the full allowlist.

---

This should give you a single document you can navigate by path: every major server route file, client route, sync/i18n/PWA wiring, MCP surface, websocket vocabulary, scheduler jobs, and wiki-aligned feature taxonomy, all anchored under **`TREK_alt/...`**.
